Overview of the events of 2024 in heavy metal music

This is a timeline documenting the events of heavy metal in the year 2024.

Events[edit]

  • On January 13, 3 Inches of Blood will perform their first show in nine years at the Commodore Ballroom in Vancouver.[1]
  • On April 6, 2023, Nightwish announced that they will go on a hiatus following the release of their upcoming tenth studio album in 2024.[2]
  • On July 20, the Klash of the Ruhrpott festival is scheduled to take place at Amphitheater Gelsenkirchen in Gelsenkirchen, Germany, which would unite Kreator, Sodom, Destruction and Tankard, known as "the Big Teutonic Four", for the first time on one stage.[3]
  • Cirith Ungol will retire from performing live at the end of this year.[4]

Albums expected[edit]

January[edit]

Day Artist Album
12 Exit Eden Femmes Fatales[5]
The Rods Rattle the Cage[6]
Scanner The Cosmic Race[7]
26 Lucifer Lucifer V[8]
Manticora Mycelium[9]
Static-X Project: Regeneration Vol. 2[10]

February[edit]

Day Artist Album
2 Enterprise Earth Death: An Anthology[11]
Myrath Karma[12]
Striker Ultrapower[13]
9 Chelsea Wolfe She Reaches Out to She Reaches Out to She[14]
Infected Rain Time[15]
Les Claypool Adverse Yaw: The Prawn Song Years (box set)[16]
Per Wiberg The Serpent's Here[17]
16 The Obsessed Gilded Sorrow[18]
See You Next Tuesday Relapses (remix album)[19]
23 Amaranthe The Catalyst[20]
Job for a Cowboy Moon Healer[21]
Mick Mars The Other Side of Mars[22]

March[edit]

Day Artist Album
1 Firewind Stand United[23]
Ministry Hopiumforthemasses[24]
8 Judas Priest Invincible Shield[25]
15 DragonForce Warp Speed Warriors[26]
While She Sleeps Self Hell[27]

  122. ^ "SUM 41's New Album 'Heaven :x: Hell' To Arrive In Spring 2024". Blabbermouth.net. October 31, 2023. Retrieved October 31, 2023.
  123. ^ "TESTAMENT Has Five Or Six 'Killer' New Songs Written For Next Studio Album". Blabbermouth.net. June 19, 2023. Retrieved June 20, 2023.
  124. ^ "Vintersorg - Join Forces With Hammerheart Records". Metal Storm. October 5, 2023. Retrieved October 5, 2023.
  125. ^ "BLACKIE LAWLESS: Next W.A.S.P. Album Won't Arrive Before Summer 2024". Blabbermouth.net. June 25, 2023. Retrieved June 25, 2023.
  126. ^ "DAVE MENIKETTI - "There Will Probably Be A New Y&T Record Within The Next Year Or So"". Brave Words & Bloody Knuckles. September 6, 2023. Retrieved September 6, 2023.
